input:
From: booking@exportradeltd.com
To: operations@maerskline.com
5ubject: 5hipping Instruction for Export Order EXP-2026-4422

Dear Operations Team,

Please find below the shipping instruction details for our upcoming export from Antwerp to Mumbai:

5hipping Instruction Reference: 5I-EXP-4422-2026
Booking Reference: MAEU-99887766

As per our contract, the freight terms are freight prepaid and the transport document type is Bill of Lading. The issue date of this instruction is June 22nd, 2026.

5HIPPER DETAIL5:
The exporter is EXPORTRA DEL TRADING LTD whose registered office is located at Hanzestedenplaats I, 2000 Antwerpen, Belgium. Their VAT identification number is BE0892I23456.

CON5IGNEE DETAIL5:
The goods are consigned to BHARAT IMPORT5 PRIVATE LIMITED with their corporate address at Nariman Point, 2I5 Free Press Journal Road, Mumbai 40002I, Maharashtra, India. Their G5T registration is 27AABCBI234CIZ5.

NOTIFY PARTY:
Please also notify 5HREE LOGI5TIC5 PVT LTD at Ballard Estate, Mumbai 40000I, India.

LOGI5TIC5 INFORMATION:
The port of loading will be Antwerp and the port of discharge will be Nhava 5heva (Jawaharlal Nehru Port), Mumbai. The mother vessel is M.V. MAER5K 5HEERNE55 with voyage number 623E. The place of receipt is the shipper's warehouse in Antwerp and the final place of delivery is ICD Tughlakabad, New Delhi.

EQUIPMENT AND CARGO:

We have one 40 foot high cube container M5KUI234567 sealed with seal number BE-ML-442200. The container's gross weight is twenty six thousand eighty kilograms and the net cargo weight is twenty four thousand seven hundred seventy six kilograms.

The cargo consists of thirty two pallets of MDF laminate flooring with shipping marks reading EXP-MUM-2026. The total volume is twenty eight point sixteen cubic meters. The H5 commodity code is 44II.I3.

Additionally, we have a second container TGHU765432I which is a 20 foot general purpose container sealed with BE-ML-44220I. Gross weight is twelve thousand five hundred kilograms and net weight is eleven thousand eight hundred kilograms. This container holds eighteen pallets of ceramic wall tiles with volume fifteen point four cubic meters. The H5 code for this item is 6908.90.

Please also note the following document references: the commercial invoice number is INV-EXP-4422 and the related bill of lading reference from the carrier will be issued.

We declare under FTA that these goods originate in the European Union under the EU-India FTA agreement.

Best regards,
Export Manager
EXPORTRA DEL TRADING LTD

Dear 0perations Team.

Please find below the shipping instruction details for our upcoming export from Antwerp to Mumbai:

5hipping Instruction Reference: 5I-EXP-4422-2026
Booking Reference: MAEU-99887766

As per our contract. the freight terms are freight prepaid and the transport document type is Bill of Lading. The issue date of this instruction is June 22nd. 2026.

5HIPPER DETAIL5:
The exporter is EXP0RTRA DEL TRADING LTD whose registered office is located at Hanzestedenplaats 1. 2000 Antwerpen. Belgium. Their VAT identification number is BE0892123456.

C0N5IGNEE DETAIL5:
The goods are consigned to BHARAT IMP0RT5 PRIVATE LIMITED with their corporate address at Nariman Point. 215 Free Press Journal Road. Mumbai 400021. Maharashtra. India. Their G5T registration is 27AABCB1234C1Z5.

N0TIFY PARTY:
Please also notify 5HREE L0GI5TIC5 PVT LTD at Ballard Estate. Mumbai 400001. India.

L0GI5TIC5 INF0RMATI0N:
The port of loading will be Antwerp and the port of discharge will be Nhava 5heva (Jawaharlal Nehru Port). Mumbai. The mother vessel is M.V. MAER5K 5HEERNE55 with voyage number 623E. The place of receipt is the shipper's warehouse in Antwerp and the final place of delivery is ICD Tughlakabad. New Delhi.

EQUIPMENT AND CARG0:

We have one 40 foot high cube container M5KU1234567 sealed with seal number BE-ML-442200. The container's gross weight is twenty six thousand eighty kilograms and the net cargo weight is twenty four thousand seven hundred seventy six kilograms.

The cargo consists of thirty two pallets of MDF laminate flooring with shipping marks reading EXP-MUM-2026. The total volume is twenty eight point sixteen cubic meters. The H5 commodity code is 4411.13.

Additionally. we have a second container TGHU7654321 which is a 20 foot general purpose container sealed with BE-ML-442201. Gross weight is twelve thousand five hundred kilograms and net weight is eleven thousand eight hundred kilograms. This container holds eighteen pallets of ceramic wall tiles with volume fifteen point four cubic meters. The H5 code for this item is 6908.90.

Please also note the following document references: the commercial invoice number is INV-EXP-4422 and the related bill of lading reference from the carrier will be issued.

We declare under FTA that these goods originate in the European Union under the EU-India FTA agreement.

Best regards.
Export Manager
EXP0RTRA DEL TRADING LTD
